summary: Add investigation/decision ticket type closing on --note + doc reference, not a test/commit
description: TicketType is currently bug|feature|refactor|chore|debt (src/types.ts) and the done-contract in src/state.ts forces a test or code commit, so investigations fight it. Add a type whose deliverable is a documented conclusion; it closes on --note + a doc/file reference. Makes the analyze trail a first-class citizen with a matching terminal shape. Files: src/types.ts, src/state.ts.

resolution.note: investigation type closes on --note (conclusion); commit optional, test not required. Verified: e2e investigation closed on note alone; unit tests cover missing-note rejection and bad-commit rejection.
